    Free SEO Tools

    87+ powerful tools to help you optimize your website's search performance and ad campaigns - completely free.

    Popular Tools

    Most Used

    Word Counter

    Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time instantly.

    Use Tool

    Meta Tag Generator

    Generate HTML meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Twitter cards with live preview.

    Content & Writing

    10 tools

    Word Counter

    Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time instantly.

    Use Tool

    Character Counter

    Count characters with/without spaces. Perfect for Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn limits.

    Use Tool

    Keyword Density Checker

    Analyze keyword frequency, density percentage, and top keywords in your content.

    Use Tool

    Readability Score Checker

    Check Flesch-Kincaid score, grade level, and sentence complexity of your content.

    Use Tool

    Duplicate Sentence Finder

    Find repeated sentences and phrases in your content for originality.

    Use Tool

    Lorem Ipsum Generator

    Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences, or words for your designs.

    Use Tool

    Text Case Converter

    Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, and more.

    Use Tool

    Article Rewriting Helper

    Highlights overused words, shows word frequency, and suggests improvements.

    Use Tool

    Headline Analyzer

    Score headlines for emotional impact, power words, length, and readability.

    Use Tool

    Basic Grammar Checker

    Check for common grammar errors, passive voice, wordiness, and more.

    Use Tool

    Meta Tag Generator

    Generate HTML meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Twitter cards with live preview.

    Use Tool

    Preview how your page will appear in Google search results on desktop and mobile.

    Use Tool

    Check multiple title tags at once for character count, pixel width, and SEO compliance.

    Use Tool

    Meta Description Checker

    Check meta description length, keyword presence, CTA, and truncation preview.

    Use Tool

    Heading Structure Analyzer

    Visualize your H1-H6 heading hierarchy and find structural issues.

    Use Tool

    Image Alt Text Suggestion

    Generate SEO-friendly alt text suggestions from image context descriptions.

    Use Tool

    Canonical Tag Generator

    Generate canonical link tags to manage duplicate content across your site.

    Use Tool

    Open Graph Preview

    Preview how your link appears when shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter.

    Use Tool

    Google Index Status Info

    Learn how to check if your pages are indexed by Google using the site: operator.

    Use Tool

    Bulk Index Checker

    Check if multiple URLs are indexed by Google in bulk using the site: operator with staggered tab opening.

    Use Tool

    SERP Checker

    Check your website's position in search engine results for target keywords.

    Use Tool

    Technical SEO

    13 tools

    Robots.txt Generator

    Build a robots.txt file with allow/disallow rules, sitemaps, and user agents.

    Use Tool

    XML Sitemap Generator

    Generate XML sitemaps with URLs, priority, change frequency, and last modified dates.

    Use Tool

    .htaccess Redirect Generator

    Generate 301 and 302 redirect rules for your .htaccess file.

    Use Tool

    Schema Markup Generator

    Generate JSON-LD schema for LocalBusiness, Article, Product, FAQ, and more.

    Use Tool

    JSON-LD Validator

    Validate JSON-LD syntax, check for errors, and preview parsed output.

    Use Tool

    Hreflang Tag Generator

    Generate hreflang link tags for multi-language and multi-region pages.

    Use Tool

    URL Slug Generator

    Convert any text to clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs instantly.

    Use Tool

    URL Encoder/Decoder

    Encode or decode URLs for proper formatting and safe transmission.

    Use Tool

    HTTP Status Code Reference

    Look up any HTTP status code and understand its meaning and SEO implications.

    Use Tool

    Page Size Calculator

    Estimate page size from HTML, CSS, and JS inputs for speed optimization.

    Use Tool

    Interactive guide to understanding and improving Core Web Vitals metrics.

    Use Tool

    Page Speed Checker

    Analyze page load speed and get recommendations for improvement.

    Use Tool

    XML to URL Converter

    Extract and convert URLs from XML sitemaps for analysis and auditing.

    Use Tool

    Keyword & Research

    7 tools

    Keyword Suggestion Tool

    Generate long-tail keyword variations from a seed keyword using proven patterns.

    Use Tool

    LSI Keyword Generator

    Generate related semantic keywords and phrases for better content relevance.

    Use Tool

    People Also Ask Generator

    Generate question-based keywords: who, what, when, where, why, how, and more.

    Use Tool

    Keyword Gap Planner

    Plan keyword targeting strategy by identifying gaps vs competitors.

    Use Tool

    Search Intent Classifier

    Classify keywords by search intent: Informational, Navigational, Commercial, Transactional.

    Use Tool

    Keyword Grouper

    Group keywords by common themes and words for organized content planning.

    Use Tool

    Bulk Keyword Checker

    Check rankings for multiple keywords across Google Search at once.

    Use Tool

    Google Ads Budget Calculator

    Plan your Google Ads budget by estimating clicks, conversions, revenue, and ROAS from your campaign metrics.

    Use Tool

    Calculate Return on Ad Spend, ACoS, net profit, and break-even ROAS for your paid advertising campaigns.

    Use Tool

    Ad Copy Generator

    Generate Google Ads responsive search ad headlines (30 chars) and descriptions (90 chars) for your campaigns.

    Use Tool

    Estimate your Google Ads Quality Score with a 12-factor checklist covering ad relevance, CTR, and landing pages.

    Use Tool

    PPC Campaign Audit Checklist

    20-point PPC campaign audit covering structure, keywords, ad copy, bidding, and conversion tracking.

    Domain & URL Tools

    6 tools

    Bulk Expired Domain Checker

    Check multiple domains in bulk for expiration status. Identify potentially expired or available domains for acquisition.

    Use Tool

    Domain Authority Checker

    Estimate domain authority score based on TLD quality, domain length, brandability, and HTTPS status.

    Use Tool

    Redirect Chain Checker

    Trace redirect chains for URLs including HTTP→HTTPS, www redirects, and trailing slash redirects.

    Use Tool

    Broken Link Checker

    Scan any webpage to find broken outbound links. Identify dead links hurting your SEO and user experience.

    Use Tool

    Bulk URL Issue Checker

    Check multiple URLs in bulk for 404 errors, dead links, timeouts, and other HTTP issues. Export results as CSV.

    Use Tool

    Force Google Indexing

    Ping Google & Bing to request fast indexing of your URLs. Bulk submit up to 100 URLs with IndexNow support.

    Use Tool
